description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage named build-meltano and a job called docker_licnese_finder. In its before_script run docker --version, then in the script log in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, build the Docker image from license_finder/Dockerfile tagging it as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/license_finder:latest, and push that image to the registry. The job runs in the build-meltano stage and has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
